hero.headline: Nitya Tour & Travels
hero.lead: Reliable cars and tour planning from Indore—local trips, outstation, and packages with a calm, professional team.
hero.description: Travel agency in Indore: car rental, taxi, tour packages, and hotel support—serving customers across India with well‑maintained vehicles.
hero.card_note: Serving Indore and pan‑India travel with care and consistency.

at_a_glance_lines: Bookings & assistance when you need them
hero_cards.how_we_work_intro: We focus on punctual pickups, clean vehicles, and courteous drivers—whether you need a day in the city or a longer itinerary.

pillars.title: Support
pillars.body: Help when you need it, day or night.

fleet_section.heading: Our fleet
fleet_section.lead: Sanitised, well‑maintained cars for city rides and outstation—pick what fits your group and route.

hotel_section.heading: Hotel & stay
hotel_section.subtitle: Tour packages with comfortable stay options—tap below to preview property photos.

why_choose.heading: Why Nitya Tour
why_choose.lead: A travel partner in Indore that keeps things simple: safe rides, honest pricing, and dependable execution.

strengths.title: Trusted service
strengths.body: Verified drivers, transparent communication, and consistent quality on every trip.

strengths.title: Fair rates
strengths.body: Clear quotations and billing—no last‑minute confusion on common routes.

strengths.title: Pan‑India
strengths.body: Local, outstation, and multi‑day itineraries planned with practical routing.

strengths.title: Responsive support
strengths.body: Booking help and trip coordination when timings or plans shift.

checklist: In any case the jurisdiction will be Indore.

footer.body: Prefer a quick reply? Use the WhatsApp or Call buttons on screen—we will confirm vehicle, route, and fare clearly before you travel.

foren_trip.header_lead: Planned itineraries for families and groups—India-wide favourites plus select international destinations, handled with the same Nitya Tour discipline.

arrange_cards.title: Ground transport
arrange_cards.body: Cars suited to terrain and group size, coordinated with your dates.

arrange_cards.title: Family & group trips
arrange_cards.body: Practical day-wise plans with room for rest and sightseeing.

arrange_cards.title: Packages
arrange_cards.body: Domestic, national, and hand-picked international options.
